mapper.select: select ( (select count(1) from payment_method_route_rule_item rri join payment_channel_contract_capability ccc on ccc.id = rri.contract_capability_id and ccc.tenant_id = rri.tenant_id where rri.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and rri.status = 1 and ccc.contract_id = #{contractId}) + (select count(1) from payment_order po left join payment_channel_contract_capability ccc on ccc.id = po.contract_capability_id and ccc.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (po.contract_id = #{contractId} or ccc.contract_id = #{contractId})) )
select config_values_json from payment_channel_contract where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{contractId} and status = 1 and del_flag = 0 limit 1
